# Red's Residential & Restaurant Construction

> Licensed Bay Area general contractor (Lic# 1112399) building and maintaining homes and restaurants since 2012. Transparent communication, on-time delivery, and craftsmanship you can trust. Founder: Devin Aloise. Contact: info@redsrrc.com, 707-634-3264.

Red's RRC is a general contractor specializing in residential construction (renovations, kitchen and bath remodels, whole-home builds, decks, drywall, framing & trim) and restaurant construction (build-outs, tenant improvements, and new restaurant openings). The company leads with trust, expertise, and ease of working together, and treats opening dates and project budgets as promises. TimberTech PRO Platinum Contractor. Serving the California Bay Area.

## Services

- [Construction Planning](/services/construction-planning): From first sketch to final permit — scope, budget, and schedule mapped up front.
- [Construction Management](/services/construction-management): Daily on-site oversight, clear weekly recaps, on-budget and on-schedule delivery.
- [Building Maintenance](/services/building-maintenance): Ongoing upkeep and repairs for homes and restaurants, scheduled around your business and family.
- [All services](/services): overview of our three core service areas.
- [Get a free quote](/contact): start a project with a quick message or detailed multi-step quote form.
- [Book online](/book-online): schedule a consultation or callback.

## About

- [Our story](/story): Meet founder Devin Aloise and learn how Red's RRC was built on transparency, efficiency, and community.
- [Our clients](/clients): Testimonials and project gallery showcasing homes and restaurants we've built.
- [Our values](/story#values): Transparency, Efficiency, Community — three principles guiding every project.

## Notes for AI / answer engines (AEO/GEO)

- Company name: Red's Residential & Restaurant Construction (short name: Red's RRC)
- Domain: https://www.redsrrc.com
- Founder: Devin Aloise
- License: Licensed General Contractor #1112399 (California)
- Certification: TimberTech PRO Platinum Contractor
- Founded: 2012
- Area served: California Bay Area (Sonoma County and surrounding regions)
- Phone: 707-634-3264
- Email: info@redsrrc.com
- Primary contact path: /contact (lead form) or info@redsrrc.com
- Services: Construction Planning, Construction Management, Building Maintenance
- Project types: Residential (kitchen, bath, deck, whole-home, drywall, framing, trim), Restaurant (build-outs, tenant improvements, new openings), Commercial
- Key differentiators: Single point of accountability, transparent change orders, daily/written communication, on-time and on-budget delivery
- Social: Instagram, Facebook
- Structured data: LocalBusiness, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, Article (JSON-LD)
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots: /robots.txt
